title: McDonald's India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: McDonald's India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!
